title: Deckbuilder curation candidates
description: Generate four proposal-only variants for a human to curate: card, tuning, flavor, and store copy.

variants.summary: Add an engine-part themed attack card candidate over the deck-roguelike substrate.

deckRoguelike.title: Spark Coil card candidate
deckRoguelike.description: A deckbuilder card candidate that demonstrates an engine-part themed attack without a new resolver.

variants.summary: Tune a deckbuilder opening encounter by adjusting the seed and starting deck mix.

deckRoguelike.title: Opening quota tuning candidate
deckRoguelike.description: A tuning candidate that changes the starting mix while remaining proposal-only.

variants.summary: Flavor text candidate expressed as a small grid-puzzle proposal for inspection.

gridPuzzle.title: Flavor room candidate
gridPuzzle.description: A flavor candidate for a workshop room where the engine wakes up.

variants.summary: Store-copy candidate kept as proposal data for human curation.

gridPuzzle.title: Store copy candidate
gridPuzzle.description: A conservative store-copy candidate: local evidence-first deckbuilding experiments for human curation.
